one_time_description: Insurance claim proceeds of $227,008 recorded as revenue in 2021
economic_notes: First Nation is currently working on a windtower project under Economic Development. Operates fisheries, aquaculture, tobacco sales, fuel sales, boat shop and consulting activities.
notes: Consolidated entity includes Indian Island First Nation Government Administration, Trust Funds, Aquaculture Development Corporation, Economic Development Corporation, and Consulting Corporation. Budget figures are unaudited per note 23. Net debt position of $1,991,232. ISC funding estimated from receivable balance as exact transfer amount not broken out separately in revenue; total government transfers calculated as sum of all federal and provincial transfer lines. OSR includes fisheries, aquaculture, tobacco, fuel, rental, boat shop, insurance proceeds and other. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $862,787 to $1,340,053.
